cuisine_type: Natural-wine bar with small-plate food (burrata gelato, ham-and-cheese, nuts)
neighborhood: 永福路 / Yongfu Lu (near Fuxing Xi Lu)
address: 47-8 Yongfu Lu, near Fuxing Xi Lu, Xuhui
signature_dishes: rotating natural-wine pours (Alsace Pinot Gris, Radikon, Fanny Sabre)
vibe_and_space: Compact wine bar + bottle shop on the quiet end of Yongfu Lu. Run by proprietor Nora Liu. Low-key but well-calibrated — a 'natural-wine person's bar' not a destination scene. Vinyl & Vino nights every other Thursday. Afternoons quiet; evenings are date / solo / small-group. Daily 3pm-midnight.
one_paragraph_recommendation: The 2025 Yongfu Lu / Xuhui wine-bar opening worth knowing — Nora Liu's natural-leaning list, tightly curated rather than encyclopedic, with food sized as snacks (not a kitchen pretending to be a restaurant). Recommend for a low-key date, a solo glass after work, or a small group sharing a bottle without committing to a full dinner. The retail nook means you can buy the bottle you liked. Distinct positioning from the 安福路 / 巨富长 high-density wine-bar cluster: quieter, more deliberate, less queue-driven. Best paired with a dinner reservation up the road first.
